creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dear maintainer of palm/pilot-link port, please take a look at this
patch:

http://miwi.homeunix.com/patches/pilot-link.diff

Do you approve/reject this update?

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

Ah I don't know what you mean, so I'll just sit here and smile at you :)
